content:
Character: Nico Vale
Perception: Nico is pleasant-looking in a tidy, put-together way — not flashy, but everything fits right, which I respect. Says he's a junior associate at some boutique firm; he's got the vocabulary but not the exhaustion, which is odd. Smart conversationalist — quick, funny, dodges personal questions with a magician's grace. We share bourbon on the rooftop; he's easy company when I don't want to think. I think he sees me as a glamorous neighbor. I see him as a drinking companion. I know almost nothing concrete about him, which either means he's private or he's hiding something. I haven't decided which.

I think he sees me as a glamorous neighbor. I see him as a drinking companion. I know almost nothing concrete about him, which either means he's private or he's hiding something.
